title: Junior Business Development Manager at Man Infraconstruction

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Man Infraconstruction
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Man Infraconstruction. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
